title: PostgreSQL Search, Language Policy, Ranking, Plans, and Safe Snippets · Type Forensics
summary: A preserved TypeScript feed-service trace contains one plausible discovery, URL, XML, validator, Fetch, stream, SQL, transaction, Promise, lease, Express, accessibility, migration, or release defect; find the earliest invalid transition before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in bounded runtime-validated reader search and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debu…
objectives: Build weighted tsvector documents from admitted safe text with language, provenance, refresh, and deletion policy.
Validate length, token count, mode, language, filters, and empty results before using parameterized plainto, websearch, or explicit tsquery.
Verify representative GIN-backed plans, selectivity, scale, write amplification, latency, row limits, and plan-change thresholds.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Feed aggregation and TypeScript Inspect the failure record · Debug Feed Ts Search Document
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug TypeScript team handles case 3287 during a hostile XML and unknown-value admission drill. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to prove admitted search, GIN plan evidence, language and rank policy, budgets, and safe snippets; every Promise, AbortSignal listener, timer, stream, pool client, transaction, lease, and handle needs an owner; then inject one URL, DNS, redirect, stream, compression, timeout, abort, or publisher-budget failure and settle ownership. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, fast-xml-parser, Express, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, handle and load claims, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Build weighted tsvector documents from admitted safe text with language, provenance, refresh, and deletion policy.

Inspect the Feed Ts Search Document trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?
